<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\Console\Completion\Output; use Symfony\Component\Console\Completion\CompletionSuggestions; use Symfony\Component\Console\Output\OutputInterface; /** * @author Wouter de Jong <wouter@wouterj.nl> */ class BashCompletionOutput implements CompletionOutputInterface { public function write(CompletionSuggestions $suggestions, OutputInterface $output): void { $values = $suggestions->getValueSuggestions(); foreach ($suggestions->getOptionSuggestions() as $option) { $values[] = '--'.$option->getName(); if ($option->isNegatable()) { $values[] = '--no-'.$option->getName(); } } $output->writeln(implode("\n", $values)); } }
